ValidationRule.description: Restrict price change when Opportunity reaches 'Closed - Won' stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Opportunity.StageName , "Stage 6 - Implement (Closed)") , OR(ISCHANGED( UnitPrice ), ISCHANGED( Quantity ) ) , $Profile.Name = "Dealer" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_PRODUCT_004: Cant Modify Product Price or Quantity for Closed Opportunities.
